news.title:
BEL may benefit from India's defence indigenisation policy amid geopolitical tensions.
BEL's electronics are widely used across all three defence forces, boosting prospects.

news.title:
BEL and SASMOS signed an MoU to enhance defence electronics manufacturing.
The MoU was signed in the presence of Defence Minister Rajnath Singh.

news.title:
BEL partners with Bellatrix Aerospace to develop satellite systems for VLEO operations.
MoU combines BEL's defence electronics expertise with Bellatrix's satellite propulsion innovation.

news.title:
Defence stocks gain focus post ₹5,083 cr deals, US-Iran conflict, with HAL awarded ₹2,901 cr contract.
Goldman Sachs retains 'Buy' on Solar Industries, PTC, and prefers Bharat Electronics among PSUs.
news.summary:

news.title:
Nifty dropped 312 points, rebounding 250 points after hitting 24,600 support zone but closed below 25,000 due to geopolitical concerns.
Bharat Electronics, Hindalco gained; InterGlobe Aviation, L&T dragged indices. Bank Nifty fell 1.14%, critical support at 59,300.
news.summary:
Nifty dropped 312 points, rebounding 250 points after hitting 24,600 support zone but closed below 25,000 due to geopolitical concerns.
Bharat Electronics, Hindalco gained; InterGlobe Aviation, L&T dragged indices. Bank Nifty fell 1.14%, critical support at 59,300.

news.title:
NSE, BSE closed for Holi; trading resumes March 4, 2026.
Sensex fell 1.3%, Nifty 1.2% amid global tensions; BEL, Hindalco gained.
news.summary:

BDL is also highlighted amidst rising interest in defence stocks.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions impact Indian markets; Nifty, Sensex expected to open lower as crude prices surge.
Stocks in focus: Adani Ports, ONGC, BEL, Airtel, Tata Motors, Aurobindo Pharma, SpiceJet, Vishal Mega Mart.

Affected sectors include infrastructure, aviation, energy, logistics, consumer goods, and pharmaceuticals.

news.title:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.

news.title:
Bharat Electronics Ltd's credit ratings by ICRA reaffirmed: Long-term limits at AAA (Stable).
Short-term non-fund based limits rated A1; total rated amount Rs.7,300 crore.
news.summary:
